proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).
Patients with mCRPC (mcrpc=1) have shorter pfs_months than patients without mCRPC.
Presence of visceral metastases (visceral_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Older age (age_years) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + age_years', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: OLS coefficient for ecog_ps = -1.150 months per unit (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher log(PSA) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).
Higher LDH (log_ldh) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive coefficient).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ log_psa + log_ldh + albumin + hgb + alp

proposed_hypotheses.text: Liver metastases (liver_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months.
Bone metastases (bone_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months.
Adrenal metastases (adrenal_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months.
Pleural effusion (pleural_effusion=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Receiving treatment_enzalutamide=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (positive coefficient when all treatments are mutually adjusted).
Receiving treatment_abiraterone=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (positive coefficient when all treatments are mutually adjusted).
Receiving treatment_docetaxel=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (positive coefficient when all treatments are mutually adjusted).
Receiving treatment_olaparib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (positive coefficient when all treatments are mutually adjusted).
Receiving treatment_lu177_psma=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (positive coefficient when all treatments are mutually adjusted).
Receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than not receiving it (positive coefficient when all treatments are mutually adjusted).
BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation=1) is associated with a difference in pfs_months in the overall cohort (any direction; tested two-sided).
AR-V7 positivity (ar_v7_positive=1) is associated with a difference in pfs_months in the overall cohort (any direction; tested two-sided).
MSI-high status (msi_high=1) is associated with a difference in pfs_months in the overall cohort (any direction; tested two-sided).
PSMA-high expression (psma_high=1) is associated with a difference in pfs_months in the overall cohort (any direction; tested two-sided).
TP53 mutation (tp53_mutation=1) is associated with a difference in pfs_months in the overall cohort (any direction; tested two-sided).
PTEN loss (pten_loss=1) is associated with a difference in pfs_months in the overall cohort (any direction; tested two-sided).

There is a positive interaction between treatment_olaparib and brca2_mutation on pfs_months: the PFS benefit of olaparib is larger in BRCA2-mutated patients than in BRCA2 wild-type patients (positive interaction coefficient).
Among patients with brca2_mutation=1, mean pfs_months is higher in those receiving treatment_olaparib than in those not receiving it (positive simple difference).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = 1.6376 months (p=1.3e-79). Olaparib main effect (BRCA2=0) = -0.0594 months (p=0.0327).
BRCA2+ Ola+ mean PFS=5.22 (n=529); BRCA2+ Ola- mean PFS=3.67 (n=4467); diff=1.545; BRCA2- diff (Ola+ - Ola-)=-0.073.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and msi_high on pfs_months: pembrolizumab's PFS benefit is larger in MSI-high patients (positive interaction coefficient).
Among patients with msi_high=1, mean pfs_months is higher in those receiving treatment_pembrolizumab than in those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: MSI+ Pem+ mean PFS=3.53 (n=79); MSI+ Pem- mean PFS=3.79 (n=1449); diff=-0.265; MSI- diff=0.075.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_lu177_psma and psma_high on pfs_months: Lu177-PSMA's benefit is larger when psma_high=1 (positive interaction coefficient).
Among psma_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher in those receiving treatment_lu177_psma than not.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_enzalutamide and ar_v7_positive on pfs_months: AR-V7 positivity reduces the benefit of enzalutamide (interaction coefficient is negative).
There is a negative interaction between treatment_abiraterone and ar_v7_positive on pfs_months: AR-V7 positivity reduces the benefit of abiraterone (interaction coefficient is negative).
Among ar_v7_positive=1 patients, the simple PFS difference (enzalutamide on minus off) is smaller (less positive or negative) than in AR-V7-negative patients.

analyses.result_summary: AR-V7+ Enza+ - Enza- diff=-0.024; AR-V7- diff=-0.027.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is univariably associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).

After adjusting for ECOG, mCRPC, albumin, log PSA, log LDH, hemoglobin, and visceral mets, age_years has a positive (suppressed) coefficient on pfs_months, indicating its raw negative effect is mediated by these prognostic factors.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable age beta=0.1740 months/year (p=0). Pearson r(age, ecog)=-0.004, r(age, albumin)=0.003.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months after adjusting for ECOG.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months after adjusting for ECOG.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months after adjusting for ECOG.
Higher cough_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months after adjusting for ECOG.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months after adjusting for ECOG.
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher log(crp_mg_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher absolute lymphocyte count (alc_k_ul) is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher BMI (bmi) is associated with longer pfs_months.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with hypertension=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with copd=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with coronary_artery_disease=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with atrial_fibrillation=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with autoimmune_disease=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
Patients with prior_malignancy=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without (negative coefficient), after adjusting for age and ECOG.
prior_chemotherapy=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_chemotherapy=0 (negative coefficient).
prior_radiation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_radiation=0.
prior_surgery=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_surgery=0.
prior_targeted_therapy=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_targeted_therapy=0.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).
Longer years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).
Among mCRPC patients (mcrpc=1), the PFS effect of treatment_olaparib is positive (beta>0) when controlling for clinical prognostic factors.
Among non-mCRPC patients (mcrpc=0), the PFS effect of treatment_olaparib is also positive.
Among mCRPC patients, the PFS effect of treatment_lu177_psma is positive when controlling for prognostic covariates.

analyses.code: subset mcrpc==1; OLS pfs ~ treatments + clin

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within BRCA2-mutated patients, the PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib (vs no olaparib) is positive in both mCRPC and non-mCRPC subsets, indicating the olaparib×BRCA2 interaction is not restricted to mCRPC.

analyses.result_summary: In BRCA2+ subset (n=4996): olaparib main beta (mcrpc=0)=1.677 (p=3.58e-36); olaparib*mcrpc interaction = -0.178 (p=0.316). Stratified means: BRCA2+/non-mCRPC ola+=5.56 (n=233) vs ola-=4.00 (n=2039); BRCA2+/mCRPC ola+=4.95 (n=296) vs ola-=3.40 (n=2428).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age and ECOG, mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (joint F-test p<0.05).
After adjusting for age and ECOG, rural_residence=1 patients have shorter pfs_months than rural_residence=0 patients (negative coefficient).
After adjusting for age and ECOG, more education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ race + insurance + rural + edu + age + ecog (joint F-test on race terms)
analyses.result_summary: Joint F-test on race_ethnicity: p=0.5818966730875312. Individual coefficients (vs reference): black: -0.013 (p=0.408), hispanic: -0.002 (p=0.87), other: 0.024 (p=0.353), white: -0.001 (p=0.921)

There is an interaction between treatment_enzalutamide and treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months (the combination's effect differs from the sum of single-agent effects); two-sided test.
There is an interaction between treatment_docetaxel and treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months.
There is an interaction between treatment_olaparib and treatment_lu177_psma on pfs_months.
After adjusting for the other listed labs, total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with pfs_months (two-sided).
After adjusting for the other listed labs, creatinine_mg_dl is associated with pfs_months (two-sided).

After adjusting for the other listed labs, platelets_k_ul is associated with pfs_months (two-sided).
After adjusting for the other listed labs, wbc_k_ul is associated with pfs_months (two-sided).

The positive treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months remains significant and large after adjusting for all other treatments, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral mets, age, and core labs (PSA, LDH, albumin, hemoglobin, ALP, NLR, CRP, weight loss).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted olaparib:brca2 interaction beta=1.4330 (p=0). Olaparib main (BRCA2=0) beta=-0.0001 (p=0.979). BRCA2 main (no olaparib) beta=0.0003 (p=0.958).

There is an interaction between treatment_abiraterone and mcrpc on pfs_months (two-sided test).

The positive olaparib × BRCA2 interaction on pfs_months is present in the low-risk tertile (low baseline prognostic-index risk).
The positive olaparib × BRCA2 interaction on pfs_months is present in the high-risk tertile (high baseline prognostic-index risk).

analyses.code: PI tertile=low; OLS pfs ~ olap*brca2 + PI features

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a comprehensive multivariable model including all six treatments, six key biomarkers, four pre-specified treatment×biomarker interactions, and core clinical/lab/symptom prognostic factors, the only large and significant treatment×biomarker interaction on pfs_months is treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation (positive sign).

In the same comprehensive multivariable model, the strongest negative prognostic factors for pfs_months are higher ecog_ps and lower albumin_g_dl, while higher log_psa, log_ldh, NLR, log_crp, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and the patient-reported symptom grades all contribute negatively.

analyses.code: comprehensive OLS w/ four treatment×biomarker interactions
analyses.result_summary: treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation beta=1.4322 (p=0); treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high beta=0.0170 (p=0.653); treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high beta=-0.0004 (p=0.965); treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive beta=0.0026 (p=0.718)

ecog_ps beta=-1.1509 (p=0); mcrpc beta=0.0004 (p=0.917); albumin_g_dl beta=0.4784 (p=0); log_psa beta=-0.3833 (p=0); log_ldh beta=-0.0978 (p=6.85e-124); log_alp beta=-0.0029 (p=0.367); nlr beta=-0.0002 (p=0.724); weight_loss_pct_6mo beta=-0.0768 (p=0); log_crp beta=-0.0001 (p=0.97); fatigue_grade beta=0.0014 (p=0.269); pain_nrs beta=0.0004 (p=0.491); appetite_loss_grade beta=0.0007 (p=0.587); brca2_mutation beta=0.0002 (p=0.974)
